name: sensorcore-skills
description: AI agent skill pack for SensorCore — covers iOS SDK, JS/TS SDK, logging integration, event taxonomy, MCP data access (21 tools), ML analytics combinator, and conversion playbook.

skills.name: sensorcore_ios_sdk
skills.description: How to install, configure, and use the official SensorCore iOS Swift Package (SPM, configure, log/logAsync, user ID, metadata, circuit breaker)

skills.name: sensorcore_js_sdk
skills.description: How to install, configure, and use the official SensorCore JS/TS npm package (npm install, configure, log/logAsync, offline buffering, circuit breaker, Remote Config)

skills.name: sensorcore_logging_integration
skills.description: How to instrument any app with SensorCore logging (setup, API, log levels, metadata, platform examples)

skills.name: sensorcore_event_taxonomy
skills.description: Standard event naming conventions and metadata keys for consistent, analytics-ready logging

skills.name: sensorcore_mcp_data_access
skills.description: Complete reference of all 21 SensorCore MCP tools: discovery (3), data access (4), ML analytics (12), and remote config (2). Every tool documented with parameters, returns, and when-to-use guidance.

skills.name: sensorcore_analytics_combinator
skills.description: Teaches the agent HOW to combine MCP tools for complex analytical questions. Contains 9 ready-made recipes (conversion investigation, post-release check, AB tests, bug root cause, etc.), decision trees, source code integration patterns, and anti-patterns.

skills.name: sensorcore_conversion_playbook
skills.description: Step-by-step playbook with ML tools: smart alerts → change detection → segment comparison → drop-off investigation → bug detective → code fix → post-release verification. Integrates source code analysis at every phase.
